_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Coordinate with system administrators to create cyber defense tools, test bed(s), and test and evaluate applications, hardware infrastructure, rules/signatures, access controls, and configurations of platforms managed by service provider(s).
reference_document_element_description: Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including compute environments, storage systems, networking, and security controls.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-015 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.547), SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.540).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.587). Shared vocabulary: [controls, infrastructure]. DCWF-only terms [access, administrators, applications, bed, configurations, coordinate] vs WIDAI-only terms [compute, configure, data, environments, maintain, networking] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.851, R=0.899). R exceeds P by 0.049 — the WIDAI KSA's 17 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 29 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (96.1%). The model interprets "Coordinate with system administrators to create cyber defense tools, test bed(s)" as logically implying aspects of "Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including c" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Superset of' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.561 ≈ STS 0.587 (gap 0.026). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [controls, infrastructure] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.3%. Shared tokens: [controls, infrastructure]. DCWF-only: [access, administrators, applications, bed, configurations, coordinate]. WIDAI-only: [compute, configure, data, environments, maintain, networking].
